general.title: Something went wrong
general.message: Sorry, there was an error loading this content. Please try again.
general.help: If the problem persists, please refresh the page or contact support.

network.title: Connection Error
network.message: Unable to connect to our servers. Please check your internet connection.
network.help: Make sure you're connected to the internet and try again.

timeout.title: Request Timeout
timeout.message: The request took too long to complete. Please try again.
timeout.help: This might be due to a slow connection. Please wait a moment and retry.

server.title: Server Error
server.message: Our servers are experiencing issues. Please try again later.
server.help: We're working to fix this issue. Please try again in a few minutes.

not_found.title: Content Not Found
not_found.message: The requested content could not be found.
not_found.help: The content may have been moved or removed.

unauthorized.title: Access Denied
unauthorized.message: You don't have permission to access this content.
unauthorized.help: Please sign in to your account to continue.
